login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your email. If you don't remember the password, we can send you a link instead.
login.magic_link_sent: Sent a link to your email. Open it on this device.
login.error_generic: Sign-in failed. Please try again in a moment.
login.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
login.error_email_format: Please enter a valid email address.
login.unlock_subtitle: Sign in with your account password — you'll land straight in the account area and can set a new PIN there.

unlock.title: Unlock account
unlock.locked: PIN locked. Wait {{minutes}} min or use biometrics.
unlock.sign_out_body: You'll be logged out and will need to sign in again.

welcome.signup_subtitle: All you need is an email address and a password.
welcome.login_subtitle: Sign in with your email and password.
welcome.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
welcome.error_conflict: That email is already in use.
welcome.error_validation: Please check email and password (at least 8 characters).
welcome.error_generic: Something went wrong just now. Please try again in a moment.
welcome.error_offline: No connection. Please try again later.
welcome.error_email_format: Please enter a valid email address.
welcome.consent_terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
welcome.consent_age: I am 16 or older (or acting with parental consent)

verify_email.title: Confirm your email
verify_email.body: We've sent you a link. Tap it and we'll pick up here.
verify_email.error_expired: The confirmation link has expired. Please try again.
verify_email.error_not_yet: Not confirmed yet. Tap the link in your email.

reset.request_body: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
reset.request_sent: Check your email. The link will bring you back here.
reset.error_link_expired: The link has expired. Request a new one.
reset.error_generic: Couldn't save right now — try again in a moment.
